reasoning: Luther Burden III was drafted by the Chicago Bears in the second round (39th overall) of the 2025 NFL Draft. He landed in a very crowded Bears wide receiving corps alongside DJ Moore and top-10 picks Rome Odunze and Colston Loveland, capping his target volume. Preseason projections expected him to have average rookie stats (e.g., around 54 catches). Recent news from November 2025 shows him missing Week 9 due to a concussion. Meanwhile, other rookies like Emeka Egbuka have reached minus odds (heavily favored) to win OROY by October 2025. Given Burden's longshot odds, limited role, recent minor injury, and the massive lead by competitors like Egbuka, Burden's chances of winning the award are effectively zero. I assign a probability of 2%, reflecting the absolute minimum threshold.
